thresholds.message: [MORPHEUS triage] Context at {percentage}% ({remaining}% remaining). ASSESS: can you complete the current task in the remaining context? If uncertain, create a session note NOW, update the registry, and inform the user.

[MORPHEUS save-state] Context at {percentage}%. IMMEDIATELY: (1) Update registry.md with any new discoveries. (2) Write session note if complex work in progress. (3) Update request-log.md status. (4) Inform the user that context is low — suggest /compact or wrapping up.
[MORPHEUS halt] Context at {percentage}%. STOP. Do NOT start new work. Finish ONLY the current edit. Inform the user immediately that context is nearly exhausted.
